"PR1"={
	country="PR1"
	1={
		first_name="José Fernando"
		family_name = "de Abascal y Sousa"
		birth_date=1754.01.01
		culture="castilian"
		religion="catholic"
		no_stats=yes
		no_traits=yes
		add_gold=100
		add_popularity=50
		# [#31 1763-remap] set_as_ruler MOVED to char:622 (Manuel de Amat y Junyent, Viceroy of Peru
		# 1761-1776). char:1 = Jose Fernando de Abascal was Viceroy in 1806-1816 (age ~9 in 1763) —
		# an 1815-design leftover. Kept for genealogy/portrait use.
		dna=""
	}
	622={ # [#31 1763-remap] Manuel de Amat y Junyent — Viceroy of Peru 1761-1776 (in office at the
		# 1763.2.16 start). b.1704 Barcelona (Catalan). Replaces char:1 (Jose Fernando de Abascal, an
		# 1806-era viceroy). Added at max+1. Sources: es.wikipedia (HIGH confidence).
		first_name="Manuel"
		family_name="de Amat y Junyent"
		birth_date=1704.12.28
		# NO death_date: setup snapshot reads any death-dated char as already-dead (the #329 rule);
		# his historical 1782 death is handled by the age system after load.
		culture="catalan"
		religion="catholic"
		add_martial=5
		add_finesse=6
		add_charisma=4
		c:PR1={
			set_as_ruler=char:622
		}
	}
	635={ # [BT-Catherine-family fix 2026-07-22] Placeholder consort for Manuel de Amat y Junyent (Peru viceroy).
		# Amat was historically a lifelong bachelor, but the engine forcibly re-marries a single adult ruler to
		# a random generated stray; a defined discreet consort is the only robust block. marry_character here.
		first_name="Manuela"
		family_name="de Bruna"
		birth_date=1720.01.01
		female=yes
		marry_character=char:622
		culture="catalan"
		religion="catholic"
		add_gold=100
		dna=""
	}
}
